title: juno albomarginata
intro: Juno albomarginata, also known as the 'Margined Juno' or 'Albo-marginated Juno', is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its delicate white and greenish-yellow flowers with distinctive white markings. Traditionally, Juno albomarginata is used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In traditional herbal preparations, Juno albomarginata is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
